categories.label: Correct Guess Tokens (Stars)
categories.description: Total stars on scoring tokens earned from correctly guessing other players' words (right side)

categories.label: Black Scoring Token (Stars)
categories.description: Stars on the black bonus token you took when finishing (right side, positive). Enter 0 if you are the black sheep or returned it.

categories.label: Unawarded Tokens (Stars)
categories.description: Total stars on your own colored scoring tokens NOT given away (left side, negative). These are tokens remaining because players failed to guess your word.

categories.label: Black Sheep Penalty (Stars)
categories.description: If you are the black sheep (most wrong guesses), enter the stars on your black token here as a penalty. Enter 0 if you are not the black sheep.
